title: No Terms. No Conditions
full_text:
Alternative Terms
 

notermsnoconditions.com
 

 

Terms and Conditions

 

 By accessing or using this site, you acknowledge and accept the following terms.
 They are intended to be complete, plain, and proportionate to the nature of what is offered here.
 

 

 

Agreement

 
 

 01
 You may use this site for any lawful purpose.
 
 

 02
 You may build with it, on top of it, or in reference to it.
 
 

 03
 Nothing here is reviewed, curated, or approved in advance.
 
 

 04
 Nothing here is guaranteed, including availability, correctness, continuity, or fitness for any purpose.
 
 

 05
 Access is not conditioned on approval.
 
 

 06
 Nothing here should be assumed reversible, recoverable, or preserved.
 
 

 07
 There is no support obligation, service commitment, or warranty of any kind.
 
 

 08
 You are responsible for what you do, what you build, and what follows from either.
 
 

 09
 There are no additional terms.
 
 
 

 

 

Entire Agreement
 

 This is the entire agreement. Nothing else is incorporated by reference, implied by process, or waiting behind another link.
 
 

 

 

Reuse

 

 
 
You may reference these terms.
 
You may adopt them as-is.
 
Terms: https://notermsnoconditions.com
 
 

 

 If you use them elsewhere, do so deliberately.
 
 

 

 

Last updated: never
 

No further pages. No hidden clauses.
